title: Production Planner Executive | Boon Lay | Up to $3000+ Bonus | 5 days #9398
description:
• Contract: 1 year (Renewable/Convertible)

  • Working Location: Jalan Boon Lay

  • Working Hours: Mon-Fri 7.30am - 5.15pm + Shift (If required)

  • Salary range: $2800 to $3000 + Completion Bonus

Job Responsibilities:

  • Monitor and generate sales for the division.

  • Plan production schedules to meet sales delivery dates

  • Plan Material purchases to meet production schedules

  • Raise purchase requisition for direct materials for production

  • Allocate explosive lots for production

  • Create and maintain production orders for production tracking to meet delivery

  • Monitor production output and material availability for production

  • Keep traceability record whenever needed

  • Maintain BOM and routing in SAP

  • SAP Material Master – create materials, routings, work centers

  • MES system administrator

Job Requirements:

  • Min Higher Nitec with any related education

  • At least 1 years in production planning

  • Candidates without experience may apply as training will be provided

  • Prefer proficient in Microsoft Officer Excel

If you are interested, please submit your application here.

Thank you for your application and we regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

By sending us your personal data and curriculum vitae (CV), you are deemed to consent to P-Serv Pte Ltd and its affiliates to collect, use and disclose your personal data for the purposes set out in the Privacy Policy available at https://www.p-serv.com.sg/privacy-policy. You acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree with the Privacy Policy.

P-Serv Pte Ltd | EA License No: 90C3494 | EA Personnel No: R25157619 | EA Personnel Name: Kauthamen Appu

You may also reach me at 91723964 for further information.

postedCompany.description:
P-Serv is one of Singapore’s most established HR solutions providers. We are the local leader in providing business process outsourcing solutions in projects related to customer service management, collections management and payroll administration. We also provide temporary and contract placements that fits the business needs and requirements of our clients.


Founded in 1990 and acquired by Kelly Services Singapore (Now PERSOLKELLY Singapore) in 2007, we have a proven track record across various different industries and have established long-term partnerships with some of Singapore’s finest local companies and key government agencies.

Our full privacy policy is available at www.p-serv.com.sg. If you wish to withdraw your consent, please drop us an email to let us know. Please feel free to contact us if you have any queries.
